dfrobot_airquality_begin.message0: Initialize air quality sensor until success
dfrobot_airquality_begin.tooltip: Initialize DFRobot SEN0460 air quality sensor, using I2C interface (address 0x19), will block until initialization succeeds

dfrobot_airquality_read_concentration.tooltip: Read the concentration of specified particle type in specified environment (ug/m³)

dfrobot_airquality_read_count.message0: Read the number of particles with size of %1 in 0.1L volume of air
dfrobot_airquality_read_count.tooltip: Read the number of particles with specified diameter in 0.1L volume of air

dfrobot_airquality_get_version.tooltip: Get the firmware version of DFRobot SEN0460 air quality sensor
